en_title: Call of Duty: Black Ops Modder Highlights Major Exploits With New Port, Activision Is Investigating
cn_title: 动视《使命召唤：黑色行动》PS移植版遭Modder利用漏洞，官方调查中
subtitle: 旧版加密漏洞卷土重来
opus_summary: 《使命召唤：黑色行动》PS4和PS5移植版沿用PS3存档加密机制，导致Modder可篡改大厅、等级和数据。动视已移除部分播放列表并调查修复方案，目前尚未出现自瞄外挂。

paragraphs.en: Activision is investigating issues revolving around mods and hackers in Call of Duty: Black Ops on PS4 and PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 动视正在调查PS4和PS5版《使命召唤：黑色行动》中与Mod和黑客有关的问题。

paragraphs.en: Last week, Activision dropped ports of Black Ops 1 and 2 on PS4 and PS5 . Although they don't feature any significant improvements or upgrades , fans were extremely happy to see these games accessible on PlayStation. However, the fun was spoiled pretty quickly.
paragraphs.cn: 上周，动视在PS4和PS5推出《黑色行动1》和《黑色行动2》移植版。虽然没有任何显著改进或升级，粉丝仍非常高兴能在PlayStation上玩到这些游戏，但乐趣很快就被破坏了。

paragraphs.en: Earlier this week, modders and exploiters began compromising lobbies in the Black Ops 1 port , leading to some players calling the game "unplayable." These lobbies allow you to rank up rapidly and basically make the entire progression system irrelevant. Activision took action pretty quickly and removed certain playlists to address the matter; however, concerns remain.
paragraphs.cn: 本周早些时候，Modder和漏洞利用者开始入侵《黑色行动1》移植版的大厅，导致一些玩家称游戏「无法游玩」。这些大厅能让玩家快速升级，基本令整个成长系统失去意义。动视很快采取行动，移除部分播放列表以处理问题，但担忧仍未消除。

paragraphs.en: YouTuber Tdawgsmitty interviewed one of the game's modders to try and figure out what's happening. As it turns out, the issue is partially rooted in the fact that the game has exploits left over from the PS3 version.
paragraphs.cn: YouTube博主Tdawgsmitty采访了该游戏的一名Modder，试图弄清发生了什么。结果显示，问题部分源于游戏保留了PS3版本遗留的漏洞。

paragraphs.en: "Essentially, what you're doing is that it's like PS3 where you copy [a save file] to your USB, and there's a website that lets you unencrypt it," said the modder. "The site lets you use a jailbroken PS4/PS5, and it will decrypt it for you. The save data is the exact same as PS3. What sucks about this port is that Iron Galaxy and Activision didn't bother changing the encryption on the files, which is the whole reason why this is available right now. That's the only reason why."
paragraphs.cn: 这名Modder说：「本质上，你做的事情和PS3一样：把一个存档文件复制到USB，然后有网站可以解除加密。网站让你使用已越狱的PS4或PS5，并替你解密。存档数据与PS3完全相同。这个移植版糟糕之处在于，Iron Galaxy和动视根本没费心更改文件加密，这就是现在能够这样操作的全部原因，也是唯一原因。」

paragraphs.en: The modder went on to note that there are people selling services that allow others to have their stats and game modded. Thankfully, there are no aimbots right now that allow people to easily kill other players with minimal effort. Things could definitely be worse, but it's unfortunate that the game is so easily manipulated.
paragraphs.cn: 该Modder还指出，有人在出售服务，帮助他人修改统计数据和游戏。庆幸的是，目前没有能让人几乎不费力就轻松击杀其他玩家的自瞄外挂。情况本来可能更糟，但游戏如此容易被操纵仍令人遗憾。

paragraphs.en: I highly recommend watching the whole video to learn more about the situation. Activision confirmed to Tdawgsmitty that it is actively investigating these issues and looking to resolve things. Only time will tell how long that takes, but at least Activision isn't abandoning these ports after bringing in a boatload of cash.
paragraphs.cn: 我强烈建议观看完整视频以进一步了解情况。动视向Tdawgsmitty确认，公司正在积极调查这些问题并寻求解决方案。修复需要多久只有时间能证明，但至少动视没有在赚取大笔收入后放弃这些移植版。
